zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Trelawny於1423年出生在英國可瓦爾時，他的父親Sir John Trelawny MP26歲，母親Lady Joanna Helligan28歲。他和Blanch Pownde至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1460年11月14日在他的家鄉享年37歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾培林特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Trelawny于1423年出生在英国可瓦爾时，他的父亲Sir John Trelawny MP26岁，母亲Lady Joanna Helligan28岁。他和Blanch Pownde至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1460年11月14日在他的家乡享年37岁，埋葬在英国可瓦爾培林特。

nameMeanings.name: Trelawny
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Cornish: locative name from Trelawny (Altarnun, Cornwall).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Trelawny was born in 1423, in Cornwall, England, his father, Sir John Trelawny MP, was 26 and his mother, Lady Joanna Helligan, was 28. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Blanch Pownde. He died on 14 November 1460, in his hometown, at the age of 37, and was buried in Pelynt, Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Trelawny est né en 1423, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Trelawny MP, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Joanna Helligan, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Blanch Pownde. Il est décédé le 14 novembre 1460, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Pelynt, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Trelawny 1423 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Trelawny MP 26 und seine Mutter Lady Joanna Helligan 28. Er hatte mit Blanch Pownde mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 14. November 1460 im Alter von 37 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Pelynt, Cornwall, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Trelawny è nato il nel 1423 nel Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Sir John Trelawny MP, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Lady Joanna Helligan, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Blanch Pownde. Morì il 14 novembre 1460, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Pelynt, Cornwall, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Trelawnyが1423年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Sir John Trelawny MPは26歳，母Lady Joanna Helliganは28歳であった。彼はBlanch Powndeとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1460年11月14日に故郷で37歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルペリントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Trelawny(이)가 1423년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Trelawny MP(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joanna Helligan(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Blanch Pownde(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1460년 11월 14일 그의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월 플이트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Trelawny nasceu em 1423, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Trelawny MP, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joanna Helligan, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Blanch Pownde. Ele faleceu em 14 de novembro de 1460, em sua cidade natal, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Pelynt, Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Trelawny родился в 1423 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Trelawny MP было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joanna Helligan, 28. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Blanch Pownde. Он умер 14 ноября 1460 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности пелинт, корнвалл, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Trelawny nació en 1423, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Trelawny MP, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Joanna Helligan, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Blanch Pownde. Murió el 14 de noviembre de 1460, en su pueblo, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Pelynt, Cornwall, Inglaterra.
